description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat black roof and light-colored exterior walls, surrounded by a white picket fence. The house features large rectangular windows, a balcony with a metal railing, and a main entryway with double doors and a small porch. The backyard includes a patio area with outdoor furniture, a circular pool, and a detached covered structure, possibly a carport or gazebo. There are several trees and shrubs integrated into the landscaping, providing greenery and shade. The property is enclosed by a low wall and a tall, pointed fence, giving it a private and secure appearance.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat black roof, large windows, a balcony, and a landscaped yard with a pool and patio, all enclosed by a white picket fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with double doors, windows, and a small porch, as well as the adjacent covered structure and landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the balcony, the circular pool, and the arrangement of trees and outdoor spaces within the fenced yard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large glass doors opening to the patio, outdoor seating, and the pool area, with the fence enclosing the property.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the tall white picket fence, the side windows, and the landscaped greenery near the pool.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows and glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Double doors with a small porch, flanked by windows and low shrubs, no steps or columns, minimalist modern style
